About M.L. Suriya

Business Consultant • Spiritual Guide • Expert Trainer

M.L. Suriya is a renowned guide dedicated to helping individuals and corporate leaders achieve both prosperity and inner peace through the 4-R Life Success System.

Credentials & Achievements:

  • ✓ Authored "Business Growth & Lean Manufacturing" for Govt. of India (NPC)
  • ✓ Helped 300+ Clients Transform their Business & Peace
  • ✓ Government Certified ZED Master Trainer
  • ✓ Certified Master Meditator
  • ✓ 30+ Years in Consulting & Meditation
  • ✓ M.A. in Philosophy & Jainology
  • ✓ B.E. Mechanical Engineering

Philosophy: "Peaceful Profit Approach" (ध्यान धन साधक) - achieving business excellence while maintaining inner peace and spiritual clarity.

The Program - 3 Levels of Mastery

Choose Your Path to Transformation

1

RISHI ऋषि

2 HOURS — 1 Day

2 HOURS - 1 DAY. Entry-level mastery to understand the 4-R framework.

2

MUNI मुनि

6 DAYS — 2 Hours Each Day

6 DAYS - EACH DAY 2 HOURS. Intermediate mastery with practical application.

3

YOGI योगी

LIFETIME — 1 Hour Daily

LIFETIME - EACH DAY 1 HOUR. Advanced mastery for continuous growth and support.
